name: proof
description: A local-first cryptographic toolkit. Executes zero-knowledge proof (ZKP) generation, circuit compilation via SnarkJS/ZoKrates, and formal verification analysis on local files. Requires local toolchains. No external API or cloud data transmission.

required_binaries.name: node
required_binaries.purpose: Required for running SnarkJS CLI for ZKP compilation.

required_binaries.name: snarkjs
required_binaries.purpose: Used for zero-knowledge proof compilation and proof generation.

required_binaries.name: zokrates
required_binaries.purpose: Optional high-level ZKP DSL for circuit compilation.

required_binaries.name: python3
required_binaries.purpose: Required to run glue scripts (zkp_tool.py, verify_lib.py).
